class.help: Registra los Tipos de Solicitud de Personal
class.label: Tipo Solicitud
class.name: MOTIVO_SOL

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL.oi_motivo_sol oi_motivo_sol, SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL.c_motivo_sol c_motivo_sol, SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL.d_motivo_sol d_motivo_sol FROM SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL ORDER BY SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL.oi_motivo_sol ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Motivos_Solicitud.MOTIVO_SOL\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL.oi_motivo_sol oi_motivo_sol FROM SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL ORDER BY SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL.oi_motivo_sol ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Motivos_Solicitud.MOTIVO_SOL\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Motivos_Solicitud.MOTIVO_SOL.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Motivos_Solicitud.MOTIVO_SOL.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL.oi_motivo_sol) as CNT from SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL.oi_motivo_sol={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL.d_motivo_sol,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL03_MOTIVOS_SOL.c_motivo_sol,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
